articles.description: The weekend crash of a plane carrying millions in cash near the triple border of Brazil, Paraguay and Argentina has prompted raids of local homes in search of the missing money, which people in the area said were carried out by Paraguayan police, newspaper Ultima Hora reported.

articles.title: LPG cylinder price on April 23: Check domestic and commercial gas rates in Delhi, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Kolkata today
articles.description: Petrol and diesel prices in India remained stable on April 23, despite rising global oil prices. Domestic LPG prices have not changed since a March hike, while commercial LPG saw increases twice, impacting businesses.

topStories.description: US-Iran War LIVE: The standoff between the United States and Iran has effectively disrupted almost all exports through the Strait of Hormuz, a route that normally carries about 20 per cent of global oil trade in peacetime—with no clear resolution in sight. topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 23): Crude oil prices cross $100 again as Iran war ceasefire talks show no progress. $120 in sight?
topStories.description: Oil prices are rising again. Peace talks between Iran and the United States are stalled. Trade through the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted. Iran seized two ships in the strait. The US maintains its naval blockade. Analysts predict prices could stay high. Disruptions may push Brent prices even higher. The market faces ongoing uncertainty.

topStories.description: The remarks came during the hearing of petitions filed by ED and its officers under Article 32 seeking a probe by the CBI into the alleged obstruction.
